label: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 14

extraction.one_line_summary: BARDET Romain attacked solo from the breakaway on the final climb, distancing BOUCHARD Clément and holding off chasing duo VINE Jay and HERRADA Jesús for the stage win.
tactical_patterns: BARDET prioritized KOM points on Pico Vilás early, then conserved energy for final climb solo attack—sequential objective strategy works.
LÓPEZ Miguel Ángel probed ROGLIČ on final climb but ROGLIČ responded with sprint acceleration, inverting typical diesel-vs-puncher dynamics.
VINE recovered from crash mid-stage to finish podium, suggesting breakaway riders can afford mechanical incidents on split-summit stages.

rider_signals.BARDET Romain: positive: switched to DSM and immediately won stage while taking KOM lead—demonstrates form peak and team-fit validation
rider_signals.LÓPEZ Miguel Ángel: neutral: tested ROGLIČ on final climb but was immediately neutralized, revealing insufficient margin to attack
rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: positive: responded to LÓPEZ attack with finishing sprint, displaying unexpected punchy acceleration rather than just containment
rider_signals.EIKING Odd Christian: negative: only minimally defended red jersey against MARTIN Guillaume, losing 2 seconds suggests vulnerability on harder mountain stages
rider_signals.VINE Jay: positive: crashed mid-stage yet recovered to podium finish, exceptional resilience and form depth for breakaway finishes
rider_signals.BOUCHARD Clément: neutral: dropped by BARDET on final climb despite being in select breakaway group, indicates KOM competition disadvantage
rider_signals.MAS Enric: neutral: stayed with ROGLIČ group but did not counter LÓPEZ attack, conservative tactics while holding top-5 GC
